note_families.topic: Principles of Consolidation, Nature of Activities, Significant Accounting Policies

sub_policies.detail: Includes ACS, AFI, Anago Direct Marketing, APLR, CCTD, PBTR, CTAD (Nov 2025). EHLB acquired Jan 2023, sold Nov 2024. Intercompany eliminated.

Franchise sales: 4 performance obligations (territory, education/operations, ongoing support, franchise license). Revenue allocated per PO over 10-year contract life. Renewals: no further consideration. Excess payments recorded as contract liability.
5% of recurring cleaning contract sales, collected monthly via reduction in franchisee payments, recognized in month services provided.
Admin support, insurance, telemarketing, computer support, misc fees. Recognized in month services provided.
Company-held master franchisees (EHLB, PBTR, CCTD, APLR, CTAD) invoice/collect on behalf of unit franchisees. Flow-through; reported net. Deferred revenue for pre-service collections: $59,308 (2025).
Stated at expected collectible amount. No interest/finance charge on past-due. >30 days = past due. Allowance: $45,000 (2025), $0 (2024/2023).
Classified available-for-sale, carried at fair value. Realized/unrealized gains in revenue. FIFO method. Level 1 fair value inputs. Annual impairment review; no charges 2023-2025.
At cost. Straight-line depreciation: 5-7 years (equipment/vehicles). Leasehold improvements: over lease life. Accelerated for tax.
Trademark purchased 2012, $184,000 cost, 10-year straight-line amortization. Net: $17,377 (2025). Annual impairment review; no charges.
Franchisees may finance acquisition costs. Deferred fees recognized when collected. Total: $64,438 (2025), $46,724 (2024), $71,880 (2023).
ROU asset and lease liability at PV using risk-free rate of 2.97%. Office lease $19,384/mo through Apr 2028.
C-Corp consolidated return, cash basis for tax. Deferred taxes for basis differences. No valuation allowance needed. No uncertain tax positions. Interest/penalties in OpEx.
Unrestricted highly liquid investments with initial maturity ≤3 months.
Management uses estimates affecting reported amounts. Actual results could vary.

note_families.detail: EBITDA: $1,023,943 (2025), $1,454,248 (2024), $1,454,333 (2023). Computed from comprehensive income adding back interest, taxes, D&A, and removing unrealized/realized investment gains/losses.
Related entity note: $529,500 at 2.94%, due May 2038 (long-term). Franchise note: $21,738 at 2.00% ($2,194/mo through Mar 2023, unsecured). Franchise territory notes: $46,724 (2025).
FMV Level 1 inputs. Stocks: $2,383,736 (domestic equities). Closed-in mutual funds: $1,397,080 (domestic). Realized gains: $243,945 (2025). Unrealized gains: $151,179 (2025).
Trademark: $184,000 cost, $166,623 accumulated amortization (2025). Annual amortization: $12,267.
Gross: $812,303 (2025). Includes $258,191 software (new 2025), $341,892 leasehold improvements, $161,965 furniture. Accumulated depreciation: $318,158. Net: $494,145.
$200,000 limit at 6.25%, matures June 2026. Collateralized by majority of assets. $0 drawn all periods.
New in 2025. For key employees. Contributions vest over time. Liability: $880,170 (long-term). Not present in 2024/2023.
ACS: 20M authorized, 13,670,320 issued, 7,340,640 outstanding (no par). AFI: 7,500 issued/outstanding. APLR/ADM/PBTR/CCTD: 100 each. CTAD: 100 (2025).
6,329,680 shares repurchased for $316,484. Unchanged all periods.

Operating lease: $19,384/mo through Apr 2028. ROU asset: $474,822. Lease costs 2025: amortization $224,596 + interest $24,737 = $249,333 total. Future payments: 2026=$232,608, 2027=$232,608, 2028=$77,536. Total $542,752 less imputed interest $11,327 = $531,425 less current portion $201,943 = $329,482 LT.

Total provision 2025: $502,045 (current $314,010 + deferred benefit $188,035). Effective rate varies from statutory due to non-deductible expenses and business meals. Cumulative temp differences: $157,793 (2025). Cash paid: $418,608 (2025).
Las Vegas territory sold Nov 2024 for $400K, cost $98K, gain $302K in other income. Revenue/expenses reclassed to other income for comparability.
Credit without collateral. FDIC excess: $2,040,779 (2025). Uninsured brokerage: $89,896.
Evaluated through March 11, 2026. No adjustments needed.
